name: LM Studio
pricing_notes: Desktop app free; LM Studio SDK (npm package) free; no API costs; GPU hardware is cost

auth.notes: Local server; no auth for localhost; optional API key for remote access

performance.notes: Local inference; TTFT 50-200ms on Apple Silicon; depends entirely on hardware and model size

agent_readiness.notes: Desktop app for running LLMs locally on Mac/Windows/Linux. OpenAI-compatible REST API server on localhost:1234. LM Studio SDK for JavaScript/TypeScript (not just REST). Model discovery and download from HuggingFace. Chat UI built in. MCP server support. Best local LLM experience for non-technical users; good for developers too.

gotchas: Desktop app required — no headless/server deployment (use Ollama for that)
Model download and management is manual vs Ollama's CLI approach
OpenAI API compatibility has some gaps in edge cases
MCP support is newer and less tested than Ollama
best_when: Privacy-conscious users wanting fully local LLM with clean desktop UI
Developers prototyping agents using local LLMs via OpenAI-compatible API
Non-technical users wanting easy local model management (discover, download, chat)
Apple Silicon Mac users wanting optimized local inference
avoid_when: Production automated pipelines (desktop app dependency is fragile)
Linux-only server environments (desktop app not suitable)
summary: LM Studio is the leading desktop app for running LLMs locally with a clean UI for model discovery, download, and chat. Exposes an OpenAI-compatible REST API on localhost for developer use. LM Studio SDK for JavaScript. MCP server support. Best local LLM experience for both non-technical users and developers. For headless/server deployments, use Ollama instead.
